user_prompt: Reskin THIS ornate horizontal title-banner plaque (reference image 1) into a LEGENDARY deep-sea theme. KEEP its exact structure: the wide horizontal ornate metallic banner frame, the central top emblem position, and the EMPTY flat center panel (reserved for title text — leave it clean, NO text). Change the top-center emblem to a LEGENDARY deep-sea voyager insignia emblem: a golden ship ANCHOR crossed with a mariner's COMPASS / ship-wheel, set on a glowing deep-blue gemstone, flanked by stylized wave-spray and pearl/seashell accents. Frame = legendary polished GOLD with deep ocean-blue and teal accents; center panel = deep-sea blue gradient with subtle light caustics. Game UI title plaque, 2D semi-painted, crisp clean edges, high detail. Isolated on a FULLY TRANSPARENT background — only the plaque shape, NO backdrop, NO scene, NO text, NO watermark.
